context: Tests whether the agent uses for_each (not count) for the multi-region resources, configures a remote backend with state locking, and avoids local state for a team workflow.

checklist.name: for_each used for SQS queues
checklist.description: The aws_sqs_queue resources use for_each = toset(...) or for_each over a map — NOT count = length(...)

checklist.name: for_each used for SNS topics
checklist.description: The aws_sns_topic resources also use for_each — NOT count

checklist.name: Remote backend configured
checklist.description: A backend block is present (e.g. backend "s3" {}) — the configuration does NOT rely on local state

checklist.name: State locking configured
checklist.description: The S3 backend (or equivalent remote backend) includes a dynamodb_table argument for state locking

checklist.name: No count with index access
checklist.description: The configuration does NOT use count.index combined with a list variable to generate resource names

checklist.name: File organization correct
checklist.description: Generated files include at minimum: main.tf, variables.tf, outputs.tf, versions.tf

checklist.name: Extensibility supported
checklist.description: Adding a fourth region requires only adding to a variable/map — not adding a new resource block

checklist.name: Usage instructions included
checklist.description: Response includes next steps covering at least terraform init, plan, and apply
